name: Crunchy Chicken-Cheese Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices swiss cheese, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the herb seasoned stuffing.
2. In a 3-quart baking dish, place the chicken and top with cheese.
3. Stir the soup and spread over the cheese; then top with tomato slices. Combine the butter and stuffing, and sprinkle over the tomato.
4. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink. Serve over hot rice. Garnish with fresh oregano if desired.
